Amu.Idx Sol.Amu.LIFECYCLE 2039A
security.note: Test of mixed fund categorization with inclNotClassified option. Best view the classifications filtered to the Portfolio "Test inclNotClassified" to see the effects on a mixed equity/bond fund. Region / Country: Original. The entire fund is assigned the country classification of the equity part. Region / Country (inclNotClassified) Equity only: Filtered by Type = Equity and set inclNotClassified = true Region / Country (inclNotClassified) Bond only: Filtered by Type = Bond and set inclNotClassified = true Region / Country (inclNotClassified) Equity + Bond: set inclNotClassified = true and multigroup = true (read out both bonds and equity)
